# SR Natural Diamond

> Authentic natural diamond jewelry crafted for the modern Indian woman. Legacy meets Luxury.

SR Natural Diamond is an Indian luxury jewelry brand offering IGI certified natural diamond jewelry in 18K gold. Founded by Mohit Chaplot and Leena Chaplot. Based in Udaipur & Delhi, India.

## Key Information
- Website: https://srnaturaldiamond.com
- Product: ENT Collection (₹85,000) — 4-piece natural diamond bundle (nose pin, earring pair, pendant)
- Diamond Quality: VS1-VS2 clarity, F-G color, 2.5 total carats, excellent cut
- Certification: IGI certified, BIS hallmarked
- Contact: +91 93525 60093 | srsonsros@gmail.com

## Detailed Information
- Summary: https://srnaturaldiamond.com/llms.txt
- Full details: https://srnaturaldiamond.com/llms-full.txt
